payload.answer: I found 1 saved article clearly about AI memory. The available records indicate an AI memory article, but they do not provide a definite article title here. I did not count the Brain/Cognee chat or the knowledge-graph open loop as saved articles.
citations: Small table entry: Query - What articles have I saved about AI memory?

entity_resolution.reason: No named-entity disambiguation was required; the query is about saved articles on the topic of AI memory.

details: Filtered out unrelated family facts and Sam preference records as not relevant to the query.
Included the AI memory article as the only clearly relevant saved article.
Excluded the Brain/Cognee chat and knowledge-graph open loop because they are not clearly saved articles.

repair_options: If you want the exact article title, surface the full metadata for the AI memory article record.
If you expect more than one result, re-run recall over article/bookmark records only so chats and notes are excluded.
